name: Picsellia
description: End-to-end MLOps platform for computer vision with dataset management, model training, experiment tracking and deployment.

seo.title: Picsellia — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Picsellia: End-to-end MLOps platform for computer vision with dataset management, model training, experiment tracking and deployment.

when_to_use: Building MLOps pipelines for computer vision model lifecycle
Managing image annotation workflows integrated with training runs
Versioning CV models and linking them to labeled dataset versions
Deploying and monitoring vision models across edge or cloud targets

pros: Supports Edge Impulse and NVIDIA Triton
cons: Less mature than Weights and Biases plus Triton
Vision-only, no NLP or tabular coverage
review.verdict: A clean CV MLOps suite for EU teams; CV-focused shops on AWS may prefer SageMaker plus W&B.
review.best_for: European computer-vision teams wanting integrated MLOps
review.not_for: Multi-domain ML teams needing NLP and tabular coverage
